spec_match.rationale: The flow now names the documented onHeadersReceived + securityInfo extraInfoSpec contract and uses details.securityInfo.certificates[0].fingerprint.sha256 throughout.

interactive.rationale: Scenario focus controls highlight every section, and a new failure branch shows missing extraInfoSpec and broken TLS outcomes.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Chrome DevTools verified the failure branch for missing securityInfo and non-secure states.

references.rationale: Cites the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> reference link as required.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex, button overrides keep bg+color paired.

summary: Chrome DevTools verified the corrected SecurityInfo event flow, scenario focus controls, and failure branch. No open questions remain for this concept.
